name: Agent Persistence
description: Persist configurations for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini Code Assist) and tools they commonly use (GitHub CLI) across dev container rebuilds using Docker volumes

scope.description: Volume scope for agent config persistence. 'user': all devcontainers share one volume. 'workspace': each devcontainer gets its own volume (keyed by devcontainerId).

claude.description: Mount Claude Code config directory (~/.claude) via volume.

codex.description: Mount Codex config directory (~/.codex) via volume.

gemini.description: Mount Gemini Code Assist directories (~/.gemini, ~/.cache/google-vscode-extension, ~/.cache/cloud-code) via volumes.

github-cli.description: Mount GitHub CLI config directory (~/.config/gh) via volume.
